zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan de Craon, Lord of Freiston於大約1100年出生在英國林可爾史爾福萊斯頓時，他的父親Guy de Craon I24歲，母親Isabella FitzBaldric22歲。他與Muriel de Beauchamp在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福萊斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1155年之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan de Craon, Lord of Freiston于大约1100年出生在英国林可爾史爾福萊斯頓时，他的父亲Guy de Craon I24岁，母亲Isabella FitzBaldric22岁。他与Muriel de Beauchamp在英国英格兰林可爾史爾福萊斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1155年之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Craon,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Krahn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerd, Gerhard, Hans, Hans-Peter, Horst, Irmgard, Mathias, Otto, Wilhelm, Willi.
German: nickname for a tall, slim long-legged person, from Middle Low German krane ‘crane’. Compare Kranich .

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Alan de Craon, Lord of Freiston was born about 1100, in Freiston, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Guy de Craon I, was 24 and his mother, Isabella FitzBaldric, was 22. He married Muriel de Beauchamp in Freiston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died before 1155, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan de Craon, Lord of Freiston est né environ 1100, à Freiston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Guy de Craon I, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabella FitzBaldric, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Muriel de Beauchamp à Freiston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1155, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan de Craon, Lord of Freiston um 1100 in Freiston, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy de Craon I 24 und seine Mutter Isabella FitzBaldric 22. Er hat in Freiston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Muriel de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1155 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan de Craon, Lord of Freiston è nato il circa 1100 nel Freiston, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Guy de Craon I, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Isabella FitzBaldric, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Muriel de Beauchamp nel Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1155, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan de Craon, Lord of Freistonが約1100年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフレイストンで生まれた時，父Guy de Craon Iは24歳，母Isabella FitzBaldricは22歳であった。イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフレイストンでMuriel de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1155年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan de Craon, Lord of Freiston(이)가 대략 1100년 영국 링코실르 프레이스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de Craon I(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella FitzBaldric(은)는 22세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 프레이스턴에서 Muriel de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1155년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan de Craon, Lord of Freiston nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Guy de Craon I, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabella FitzBaldric, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Muriel de Beauchamp em Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 1155, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan de Craon, Lord of Freiston родился около 1100 г. в местности фристон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Guy de Craon I было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella FitzBaldric, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Muriel de Beauchamp в местности фристон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1155 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan de Craon, Lord of Freiston nació aproximadamente 1100, en Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Guy de Craon I, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabella FitzBaldric, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Muriel de Beauchamp en Freiston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 1155, en su pueblo.
